title: Lost opportunity recovery
goal: Find lost opportunities and enroll approved contacts into a recovery workflow.

steps.description: Search lost deals in the target pipeline.
Inspect each contact before enrollment to avoid bad-fit or do-not-contact records.
Apply a recovery tag to approved contacts.
Enroll the approved contact into the recovery workflow.

confirmationPoints: Before enrolling contacts without recent consent
output: Return enrolled contact IDs, skipped contacts, and the workflow ID used.
